And I had an idea of what it might be. And I said, hey, register here if you wanna come on in. And I sent out an email about it. And people started registering. I went and I started creating the registration, and then I went and I emailed. I started talking about it. And I got on social media and I went to different forums and different groups and said, hey, I'm doing the free thing. If you wanna come check it out. People got on and they started registering. Day number two, literally January 2nd, I was like, oh crap. What should I sell? And I started asking people and asking people in the group and asking people around, right? I was like, hey, what if you had help? What kind of help would you want? And they started telling me, I wish I had this, or I'm getting stuck in these areas. I'm getting stuck in this area. And they started giving me an idea of what they would want to buy. I was like, sweet. And I started writing the script, which is something I'm gonna talk about in a second. They would get up on stage and these guys would be making millions of dollars and they're getting on stage and I was a little intimidated, sitting in the back, you know, like, whoo, trying to take notes, trying to keep my cool, you know, like, oh, hey, that's about a thing, babe, what's that? And that was the hardest part for me to get past, was to watch each of these guys get on stage and be like, you're all selling the same way. It's not what you're selling, it's how you're selling it. Okay, you need to understand this, this is not one-on-one selling. What we are teaching you inside of this program is one-to-many selling. What? Okay, that's why I can be on a trip in a hotel room right now, go into Hollywood doing some cool stuff here for some cool clients, okay? And my funnels are still selling the majority of people who are going to them. Well, I'm not the one doing the selling. One-on-one selling is not the same as one-to-many selling. So when you go and you watch the things that he's doing, it is a script that is crafted to create a one-to-many selling scenario. How do I tell a script that goes and covers the majority of the issues in the audience? How do I craft the stories that alleviate the majority of the false beliefs in the audience so that I still get sales coming in? Now let's take that crap and go put it on the internet. The fact that it's on the internet does not mean it's a funnel. It's a funnel regardless. If you've sold anything ever, you have a funnel. It's the reason why I can launch a funnel and something will fail, because it does. All of us launch. Usually every time we launch a funnel, it fails the first one time out. We go tweak it and we relaunch, now it's like break even. And then we launch it, we retweak, and now then it starts making money. Just know that all of us do that. All the professionals do that. Don't get freaked out at that when that happens to you. But the reason why I can jump back so fast is because I've learned to become the attractive character of my business, which creates a following. We're gonna talk about that in the future as we move forward a little bit here. But I just wanna understand, I strongly, strongly encourage you to not outsource the attractive character piece of your business. Learn to become that and then you, it's your protection, it's literally the safety net for you and your future. The safety net for your business is publishing, but the safety net for you as an individual is learning to become a followable individual on the internet. And unless you are an exception of human psychology, it's gonna work for you. You see what I'm saying? I get real fiery about that one, so I'm like, well it doesn't work for you because I'm in this scenario. Oh my gosh, there's the door. I wanna understand this stuff. I'm a cyborg. I love it, sounds good. What script? Someone said what script? So the scripts, guys go watch and the first time what you're gonna go do is just experience, experience the script that Russell's going through during the 10X secrets thing. That is the purpose of today's challenge. Experience that script. But second of all, what I need you to do is that while you are watching it, I'm gonna pre-frame it a little bit for this next piece. You have buying emotions that Russell will put in you, literally, okay? For a product that you don't even know about yet. There's some serious magic going on with that. The thing that will make or break you in this game is if you can understand that products don't sell themselves. They don't. Products never sell themselves. So we need to create a script that sells the product, okay? There are two halves to the game. The funnel is just how it's delivered. But what you're really learning here to be a funnel builder and build a funnel, the one funnel way challenge, is to learn offers and messages. They're two separate things. They work together, but the fallacy comes and believe in your product is so good that all I need to do is put it in front of people and they're gonna buy garbage, okay? Very few products ever have actually done that successfully. Very few ever, okay? Maybe when Steve Jobs fit up with the iPod and said a thousand songs in your pocket. Maybe, but even then, that's still a pitch, okay? You understand what I'm saying? Okay, so what I need to do then what I'm trying to bring your attention to again and we're gonna stop here is what is Russell doing and saying that causes buying emotions in me? Because it is emotional, not logical. Before I even know what the product is, before I even know what his offer is, before I even see him go through all the stack slide things. How is he doing that? And then we're gonna go into heavily how to write those kinds of scripts for you guys in the coming challenge here. Cool? Let's do it! Appreciate you, you're all awesome.
